title: centaurea pinae
intro: Centaurea pinae, also known as Piny St. John's Wort, is a plant species in the daisy family (Asteraceae) that is native to the Mediterranean region. It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic compounds that have been shown to have antimicrobial and antiviral effects. The health benefits of Centaurea pinae include its ability to aid in wound healing, reduce inflammation, and exhibit antioxidant properties, making it a potential natural remedy for various health conditions. Centaurea pinae can be prepared as a herbal tea, tincture, or infused oil, which can be used to treat a range of ailments.
